divider: *(Tutor closes the synthesis with growth-in-demonstrated-capability framing and explicitly previews M03. No student action; tutor speaks. Per BrainLift DOK3, no fixed-trait identity praise — only observable growth language.)*
tutor_narration: "You can now write the same fact two ways. That is a skill you will use in every lesson that comes next. Tomorrow, you'll start finding ALL the rectangles that share the same area — not just one. And every time you check a rectangle, you'll see both ways the equation can be written, just like today. The equal sign means both sides have the same value. Same fact, both ways around. You're ready."
